title: Write ferrum_extlib_cli.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_cli: declarative option parsing with source tracking. Ferrum stdlib has env.args() but no declarative parser. Design extlib module: schema-driven option definition (name, type, default, env var, config file key, help text), types (bool/string/int/uint/float/size/duration/path/enum/list/count), source priority (CLI > env > TOML config > default), source tracking, auto-generated help, effective-config dump.
